title: Logical error: 'Bad cast from type DB::ColumnVector<int> to DB::ColumnVector<char8_t>' with Parquet reader v3
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
SET enable_time_time64_type= 1;
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0', format = 'Parquet');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
SELECT c0 FROM icebergLocal(local, structure = 'c0 Int', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0', format = 'Parquet') x PREWHERE toInt32('256:08:15'::Time) SETTINGS input_format_parquet_use_native_reader_v3 = 1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Bad cast from type DB::ColumnVector<int> to DB::ColumnVector<char8_t>'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000276ffaf2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000147ffa69
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d25718e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d256b91
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&, String&&) @ 0x000000000d255476
5. src/Common/typeid_cast.h:31: T typeid_cast<DB::ColumnVector<char8_t> const&, DB::IColumn const>(DB::IColumn const&) @ 0x000000000d28c29b
6. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/Parquet/Reader.cpp:1960: DB::Parquet::Reader::applyPrewhere(DB::Parquet::Reader::RowSubgroup&) @ 0x000000001fef136e
7. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/Parquet/ReadManager.cpp:333: DB::Parquet::ReadManager::finishRowSubgroupStage(unsigned long, unsigned long, DB::Parquet::ReadStage, DB::Parquet::MemoryUsageDiff&) @ 0x000000001fed2541
8. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/Parquet/ReadManager.cpp:687: DB::Parquet::ReadManager::runBatchOfTasks(std::vector<DB::Parquet::ReadManager::Task, std::allocator<DB::Parquet::ReadManager::Task>> const&) @ 0x000000001fed50b7
9. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/Parquet/ReadManager.cpp:584: void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void ()>::__call_impl[abi:se190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::Parquet::ReadManager::scheduleTasksIfNeeded(DB::Parquet::ReadStage)::$_1, void ()>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*) @ 0x000000001fed692a
10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x00000000173c05b9
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000014946c53
12. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x000000001494d326
13. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x00000000149440e6
14. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se190107]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x000000001494ab00
15. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
16. __clone3 @ 0x0000000000133b5c
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 Int, c2 String) ENGINE = OBEngine DEFAULT CHARSET utf8;
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
CREATE TABLE t2 (c3 Float64, c4 Date) ENGINE = OBEngine DEFAULT CHARSET utf8;
SELECT c1, CASE WHEN c2 IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(c2 AS Int) END AS c2_int FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Bad cast from DB::ColumnVector<int> to DB::ColumnVector<char8_t>
